>更新时间：2026.07.11

# 微信支付 - JSAPI支付（普通服务商）文档索引

> JSAPI 支付是微信支付面向微信内置浏览器场景的收款产品，支持用户在微信内完成选购、确认支付、验密扣款全流程，支付后可返回商户页面，主要用于公众号、微信内网页收款场景。（V2版本接口采用XML作为数据交互的格式）

## 接入指引
- [协议规则](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v2/partner/4011987396.md)
- [场景介绍](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v2/partner/4011936636.md)
- [常见问题](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v2/partner/4011936641.md)
- [开发指引](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v2/partner/4011936639.md)
- [接入前准备](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v2/partner/4011936638.md)
- [支付账户](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v2/partner/4011987862.md)
- [案例介绍](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v2/partner/4011936637.md)
- [获取微信版本号](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v2/partner/4011936640.md)

## API 列表
- [统一下单](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v2/partner/4011936644.md)
- [JSAPI调起支付](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v2/partner/4011936643.md)
- [查询订单](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v2/partner/4011936645.md)
- [关闭订单](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v2/partner/4011936646.md)
- [申请退款](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v2/partner/4011936647.md)
- [查询退款](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v2/partner/4011936648.md)
- [下载交易账单](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v2/partner/4011936649.md)
- [下载资金账单](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v2/partner/4014314653.md)
- [支付结果通知](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v2/partner/4011936650.md)
- [交易保障](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v2/partner/4011936651.md)
- [退款结果通知](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v2/partner/4011936652.md)
